mapper.sql: cp.comp_id, cp.e_cri_val, cp.w_cri_val, cp.g_cri_val, cp.e_bf_alert_yn, cp.g_bf_alert_yn, cp.w_bf_alert_yn, cp.alert_mails, cp.sense_tb_nm,
mapper.select:
SELECT
created_at, updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_comp_preferences cp

SELECT
created_at, updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_comp_preferences cp WHERE comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_comp_preferences ( comp_id, comp_nm, comp_rmk, rgst_no, corp_no, rpst_nm, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2, chrg_prsn, tel_no, biz_nm, biz_cd, main_prdt, prd_amt, photo_file_id, cmplt_de, fl_area, sales_amt, full_empl_cnt, avrg_work_hr, clnt_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{compNm}, #{compRmk}, #{rgstNo}, #{corpNo}, #{rpstNm}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2}, #{chrgPrsn}, #{telNo}, #{bizNm}, #{bizCd}, #{mainPrdt}, #{prdAmt}, #{photoFileId}, #{cmpltDe}, #{flArea}, #{salesAmt}, #{fullEmplCnt}, #{avrgWorkHr}, #{clntId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_comp_preferences SET e_cri_val = #{eCriVal}, w_cri_val = #{wCriVal}, g_cri_val = #{gCriVal}, e_bf_alert_yn = #{eBfAlertYn}, w_bf_alert_yn = #{wBfAlertYn}, g_bf_alert_yn = #{gBfAlertYn}, alert_mails = #{alertMails}, sense_tb_nm = #{senseTbNm}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE comp_id = #{compId}
